chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 08 of 2013 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Main Petition. 20.02.2026. None present.......... None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation has been received. This matter is pending for over 12 years, and it appears even now no one seems to be pursuing this matter, reflecting that the Petitioner has lost interest in the same. This Petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
